description: How an idea appears in the current work.

values.name: Central Thesis
values.use_when: the idea is a main claim or load-bearing thesis.

values.name: Supporting Framework
values.use_when: the idea supports the argument as a framing structure.

values.name: Background Assumption
values.use_when: the idea is presupposed more than argued.

values.name: Contested Claim
values.use_when: the idea is actively disputed or problematized.

values.name: Rhetorical Device
values.use_when: the idea mainly organizes persuasion or framing.

values.name: Methodological Tool
values.use_when: the idea is chiefly used as an analytic procedure.
